summary: Frontend testing for Areas dropdown (desktop) and Service Areas accordion (mobile) restructuring. All tests PASSED. Desktop shows 3-column grid with orange uppercase region headers (SAN FRANCISCO, PENINSULA, MARIN COUNTY) separated by column borders. Mobile accordion displays grouped cities with region labels (10px, uppercase, 0.3 opacity). Total 32 cities correctly distributed: 13 SF + 8 Peninsula + 11 Marin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Areas dropdown and Service Areas accordion restructuring verified. Desktop: 3-column layout with orange uppercase region headers, 32 city links, column borders. Mobile: grouped cities with region labels (10px, uppercase, 0.3 opacity). Data source: areasGrouped from navbarData.js.
